title: d2c IR Component Match
description: Model-authored file mapping Figma node IDs to candidate components and the chosen component. Emitted in Phase 2 before any code generation. Cross-referenced by layout.json and consumed (frozen) by Phase 3 codegen. v1: unscored candidates. v2: scored top-3 candidates with breakdown.

nodes.description: Map of Figma node ID (e.g. '1:234') to component-match entry.

figma_name.description: The Figma layer/instance name. Human-readable anchor for review.

figma_type.description: The Figma node type (e.g. INSTANCE, FRAME, COMPONENT).

candidates.description: Candidate components considered for this node. v1: >= 1 entry. v2: 0-3 entries scored and sorted descending by score. Empty array is valid only when chosen is '__NEW__'.

chosen.description: The chosen componentId (must appear in candidates[].componentId), the literal '__NEW__' to signal a new component must be created, or null to signal ambiguity (validator fails fast on null).

chosen_reasoning.description: Prose explaining why chosen was picked. Mandatory so the file is human-inspectable without Figma open.

componentId.description: Display-only identifier for the candidate. The unique key for validation is 'source'.

source.description: File path to the candidate component, relative to project root.

reasoning.description: One-line explanation of why this component is a candidate.

score.description: v2 only. Composite score (0-100) = props_match + usage_frequency + alignment.

score_breakdown.description: v2 only. Per-dimension scores that sum to 'score'.

rejected_because.description: v2 only. Required for non-chosen candidates. Why this candidate was not selected.

user_confirmed.description: v2 only. If true, the user confirmed this choice in Phase 1.4b, bypassing the 50-point threshold.

props_match.description: How many Figma visual properties map to component props. Formula: floor(matched_props / max(figma_identifiable_properties, 1) * 50).

usage_frequency.description: Relative ranking by import_count among candidates for this node. Highest gets 25, others scale linearly. 13 if no data.

alignment.description: Semantic alignment between component name/description and Figma node name/context. Bands: 0-8 (none), 9-17 (partial), 18-25 (strong).
